holdings.infoBox: IJT is an equity ETF with a total of 368 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sanmina stock at N/A, Viavi Solutions at N/A, FormFactor at N/A, Semtech at N/A, and Argan at N/A.

overview.description: The iShares S&P Small-Cap 600 Growth ETF (IJT) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Small Cap 600 Growth index. The fund tracks an index of small-cap US stocks. The index selects growth stocks from the 600 stocks chosen by the S&P Committee. IJT was launched on Jul 24, 2000 and is issued by BlackRock.
